name: deck
description: Deliver a lesson as an animated slideshow — one idea per screen, prev/next, motion. Skill-only: composes the runtime's <Paged> + motion, no new deps. Folder skill with an index that routes to sub-guides.

skill.loadWhen: the lesson should be delivered slideshow-style — one idea per screen, paced with prev/next, for a talk, a kiosk, or a tablet
